properties.remark: At 3:13pm... reports of trees downed, with a report of a tree on a house northeast of Ellsworth. Time estimated by radar.
Delayed report of a tree down at a residence in Michaywe.
Trees down on Old State Rd.
Measured 1 inch hail by NWS employee in Gaylord at 4:40pm.
Report of 1.50 inch hail just west of Gaylord.
Numerous reports of tree limbs downed around Au Gres. Time estimated by radar.
Trained spotter reports quarter sized hail and vehicle damage 1 mile north of Chums Corner in Grand Traverse County. Time estimated by radar.
Grand Traverse County central dispatch reports a tree downed on a house near Fire Station 12 at Silver Lake.
Report of power lines down on Hartman Road.
Delayed report relayed by broadcast media. Pontoon boat flipped over on far south end of Lake Leelanau. Time estimated.
Report of 1 inch hail near Sparr. Time estimated by radar.
Delayed report of large hail. Photos submitted to NWS Gaylord support hailstones of about golf ball size, along with significant accumulations of hail in the area. Time estimated by radar.
South Airport Road West becoming impassable due to floodwaters at LaFranier Road.
All lanes of Grandview Parkway flooded. Spotter reports that traffic is backing up due to the flooding.
Report of a tree down on a power line at North Bard Road and Eaton Road. EM stated that the power line was arcing. Time estimated by radar.
NOS station WNEM4 West Neebish Island, MI.
Trained spotter reports small trees downed on McNeary Lake. Time estimated by radar.
Fire chief reports quarter sized hail at 6 Mile Road and East Birch Point Trail. Time estimated by radar.
Confirmed waterspout reported from EM.
Local media reports multiple trees and powerlines down in the city of Frankfort. Confirmed by EM.
Hail about the size of quarters reported on US-31 in Interlochen.
Quite a bit of hail partially covering US-31.
Images and video shared on social media of hail covering the ground in and around Interlochen.
Hail about the size of quarters falling on M-115 northwest of Cadillac.
Public report of large tree down near Townline Rd and Lakeview Dr.
Delayed reported. Several trees down with power outages near Moddersville. Time estimated via radar.
AWOS station KMCD Mackinac Island.
Delayed...Report relayed via social media of mainly dime sized hail, but a few golf-ball sized hail stones aboard Joseph L. Block, 5mi W of Martin Reef Light, SE of Cedarville.
Social media report with pic. Mainly nickel sized but some larger than a quarter.

Picture relayed from broadcast media. Trees down in vicinity of 500 block of 8th Street in Traverse City. Broadcast media also relayed additional pictures of downed trees from the Traverse City area. Time estimated from radar.
Corrects previous non-tstm wnd gst report from 2 SE Traverse City to tstm wnd gst report. ASOS station KTVC Traverse City - Cherry Capital Airport.
Corrects previous non-tstm wnd gst report from 1 SE Greilickville to tstm wnd gst report. Mesonet station XELM Elmwood Township Marina.
Various reports of wind damage, including downed trees and power poles, from mping and social media in this area. Time estimated from radar.
Delayed report of quarter size hail near Front and Division in Traverse City. Spotter also reported lots of tree damage in the area. Time estimated from radar.
Corrects previous non-tstm wnd gst report from 4 W Bates to tstm wnd gst report. Mesonet station MC112 Mdot Site.
Report via social media. Pictures of measured 1.5 inch hailstones on far north side of Neebish Island. Time estimated via radar.
Corrects previous hail report from 1 NW Au Gres. New report on social media showing 2 inch hail stones.
Delayed report. Public video of waterspout over Little Traverse Bay. Video shared via International Centre for Waterspout Research YouTube page.
Grand Traverse County Emergency Management reports flooding at several spots in and around downtown Traverse City.
